calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-29-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-25-2024 Continued To Apr-29-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-22-2024 Continued To Mar-25-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sabrina Tseng appeared by zoom for Tamara Chan (administrator).

Mrs. Tseng stated that the federally insured bank accounts still need to be opened, that her client was having some health issues and was unable to go to the different banks, that her client is now feeling better and that the daughter is going to assist her and take to the banks. Mrs. Tseng also stated that additional small estate affidavits have been sent out to the beneficiaries, that she has received some, but not all of them and that they are still in the process of obtaining the death certificate. The First and Final Account and Report of Administration, etc. is continued to March 25, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-06-2023 Continued To Jan-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-28-2023 Continued To Nov-06-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Sabrina Tseng appeared by zoom for Tamara Chan (administrator).

Mrs. Tseng stated that they are still waiting for the parties to provide the signed small estate affidavits, that they received two death certificates and are still waiting for one, that her client has not given them proof regarding the funds being in FDIC insured limit accounts and that she needs about 60-days. The First and Final Account and Report, etc. is continued to November 6, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Sae Phan. Not reported.
